# Sylwia Olszewska – Coach DOBROstanu

Sylwia Olszewska is a Professional Certified Coach (PCC) accredited by the International Coach Federation (ICF). She specializes in supporting individuals through professional and personal transformations, focusing on well-being ("DOBROstan").

## Professional Profile
- **Accreditation:** ICF PCC (Professional Certified Coach).
- **Background:** Extensive managerial experience in the financial industry, transitioning from team member to executive leadership.
- **Approach:** Focuses on identity, emotions, needs, and overcoming blocks/limiting beliefs. Uses tools like DISC (certified facilitator) and Mindfulness.
- **Education:** 
    - Management & Marketing (Menedżerska Akademia Nauk Stosowanych, Warsaw).
    - Postgraduate Coaching Studies (Uczelnia Łazarskiego).
    - Team Coaching (House of Skills).
    - Coaching Proficiency (CoachWise).

## Key Content Sections
- **About Me:** Details her journey from corporate management to professional coaching and her philosophy of "not putting yourself off for later."
- **Articles:**
    - *Miłość do siebie to podstawa, a nie nagroda* (Self-love as a foundation).
    - *Później* (The dangers of procrastination).
    - *Niezawodna czy niewidzialna?* (Balancing personal needs vs. others).
    - *Jeżeli czekasz na kogoś...* (Taking agency over one's life).
- **Services:** Professional coaching sessions, consultations, and team development.

## Contact & Links
- **Email:** coach@sylwiaolszewska.pl
- **Consultations:** https://calendly.com/coachsylwiaolszewska/bezplatne-konsultacje
- **Social Media:**

    - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CoachSylwiaOlszewska

## Technical Info
- **Website:** https://sylwiaolszewska.pl (implied by CNAME)
- **Stack:** HTML5, Vanilla CSS, JavaScript.
